title: acer negundo var. californicum
intro: Acer negundo var. californicum, commonly known as California boxelder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Sapindaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of California boxelder include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and fighting off infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
